---
title: "Clean Air and health Research Data and Analysis Technology platform"
format:
    html:
        page-layout: full
---

{{< include /_common.qmd >}}

Welcome to the Clean Air and health Research Data and Analysis Technology (CARDAT) platform. 

We promote air quality and health research through data and software sharing, supporting reproducible data analysis and responsible data management practices. Our online research platform collates a wide array of population, health and environmental data alongside a collection of analysis tools and methodological resources.

--- 

:::: {layout-ncol=3}

::: {#first-column .index-menu-card}

[About CARDAT](about/index.qmd)
:::

::: {#second-column .index-menu-card}

[Using CARDAT](using_cardat/index.qmd)
:::

::: {#third-column .index-menu-card}

[Data sharing and science](data_and_tools/index.qmd)
:::

::::
